visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Outdoor park setting during the day. The main character, Cai Aga, is walking away from the camera. A person wearing a green hooded parka and a black face mask rushes from the right to snatch his black bag. (2) Cai Aga and the hooded person struggle for the bag with exaggerated, comical physical movements and facial expressions of shock and anger. (3) They stop the struggle as Cai Aga realizes it's a friend. They stand on a rubberized playground surface. Cai Aga opens his bag to reveal several small white packets of Migoo nuts. (4) Close-up shots of the nut packaging and a white plate filled with various nuts and raisins are shown in high detail with bright, clean studio lighting. (5) Back in the park, Cai Aga approaches another man sitting on a park bench who is recording with his smartphone. Cai Aga interacts with him and offers him the nut packets. (6) A montage of various products from the same brand appears, including boxed noodles, colorful jars of drinks, and yellow packets of pork floss, all presented with professional food photography styling. (7) Cai Aga stands in front of the camera, pointing and gesturing enthusiastically while holding the nut packets. He encourages the audience to check his bio for group buying information.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: (腳步聲). (2) [Variety]: 幹什麼東... 搶什麼東西. (3) [Subtitle]: 欸那是你. [Logo]: @yga0721. (4) [Variety]: 空. [Subtitle]: 謀厚喔. (5) [Subtitle]: 老朋友了啦. (6) [Slogan]: 網路聲量第一名. 號稱堅果界的愛馬仕. 彌菓頂級堅果隨手包. (7) [Slogan]: 無添加. 真正低溫烘焙. 嚴選當季頂級飽滿大堅果. 低溫輕焙堅果. 75度-90度 耗時3到6小時. (8) [Subtitle]: 散發優雅迷人香氣. 能夠品嚐到頂級堅果最純粹的美味. (9) [Slogan]: A.A. Clean Label 國際無添加三星. 比利時米其林 iTQi 一星. (10) [Variety]: ?. [Subtitle]: 不要吃瓜啦. 來吃堅果啦. (11) [Subtitle]: 堅果不都長一樣. 那是你沒吃過彌菓. (12) [Slogan]: 被堅果耽誤的鍋燒麵. 各種沖泡飲品. 得過獎的豬肉絲. (13) [Subtitle]: 記得要tag我喔. [Logo]: @yga0721. (14) [Slogan]: 現在嘎哥團購中.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main creator (Cai Aga), 1 friend in a green parka, 1 friend sitting on a bench.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Adult male with brown hair, wearing a black lace-textured shirt over a horizontal black and white striped shirt, paired with loose white pants.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical urban park with mature green trees, benches, playground safety flooring, and tall residential apartment buildings visible in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy male shouting erupts as a bouncy, fast-tempo electronic BGM kicks in. Percussive 'thud' and 'whoosh' sound effects accompany the rapid rustling of a bag being yanked. (2) Vocal pitch fluctuates wildly with comedic shouting. Sharp 'impact' sound effects mark physical points of contact in the struggle. (3) The tone settles into a rapid-fire, enthusiastic conversational rhythm. The BGM maintains a steady, lighthearted comedic beat. (4) Narration speeds up as a series of 'ding' sounds and digital interface SFX signal the appearance of on-screen text overlays. (5) The speaker's volume increases and pitch rises during the final call to action. The BGM concludes with an final upbeat synth stinger and a digital transition 'whoosh'.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Resolution -> Product Introduction -> Testimonial -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video utilizes a comedic 'fake robbery' skit to immediately capture viewer attention before pivoting into a high-energy endorsement for 'migoo' nut products and other food items. It aims to persuade the audience of the product's quality through awards and taste-testing, ultimately driving traffic to the creator's social media profile for a group purchase link.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The creator directly shows the products, lists their specific manufacturing advantages (low-temperature roasting, international awards), and explicitly mentions a group purchase promotion.

high_inference.freeDescribe: Classic social-media-native editing with very high text density and rapid-fire speech to maximize information retention in a short-form format.
